sections.paragraph:
ἀπαίρω fut. ἀπαρῶ; 1 aor. ἀπῆρα LXX; pf. ἀπῆρκα; 1 aor. pass. ἀπήρθην (s. αἴρω; Eur., Hdt. et al.; TestSol 26:6; TestLevi 7:4; ParJer 3:8; LXX; Jos., Bell. 4, 87, Vi. 422).

① trans. take away τινὰ ἀπό τινος, in our lit. only pass. ὅταν ἀπαρθῇ ἀπʼ αὐτῶν ὁ νυμφίος when the bridegroom is taken away from them Mt 9:15; Mk 2:20 (GBraumann, NovT 6, ’63, 264–67); Lk 5:35. Yet there is no need to assume the necessity of force Ac 1:9 D.

② intr. go on a journey, depart, leave (cp. our ‘take off’, as for a vacation) PPetr II, 13 [5], 5 [III b.c.] ἀπηρμένος=gone on a journey. Cp. PLips 47, 12 [IV a.d.]; POxy 1873, 13 [Va.d.]) Παῦλος … ἀπῆρεν εἰς Μακεδονίαν Paul … has left for Macedonia AcPl Ha 5, 26; ἀπάραντος τοῦ πλοίου after the boat had left 7, 22; uncert. ἀπέ[ρομ]ε εἰς Ῥώμην (ἀπέρομε=ἀπαίρομαι Schubart) 7, 14.—M-M.

fut. fut. = fut.

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. pf. = perfect

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

TestLevi TestLevi = Testament of Levi, s. Test12Patr—List 2

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

trans. trans. = transitive

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

NovT NovT = Novum Testamentum (periodical)—List 6

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

intr. intr. = intransitive

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

PLips PLips = Griech. Urkunden der Papyrussammlung zu Leipzig—List 4

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 96
